summary: Diesel fuel price integration backend testing complete. All 17 tests passed (100%). POST /api/fuel-prices endpoint working correctly with HERE Fuel Prices API. Returns stations with dieselPrice field (fuelType=5 filtering). Chicago area test returned 1771 stations with 13 having diesel prices. Frontend service exports verified: fetchFuelPrices, fetchCorridorFuelPrices, findCheapestDiesel, matchFuelStationToPoi.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/fuel-prices returns 200 with stations array
VERIFIED: Station objects contain all required fields: id, name, brand, lat, lng, distance, dieselPrice, currency, unit
VERIFIED: Diesel prices filtered correctly (fuelType=5) - 13 stations with diesel out of 1771 total in Chicago
VERIFIED: Diesel prices are valid numeric values ($2.699 - $3.899/gal range)
VERIFIED: Default radius (50km) works when radius not specified
VERIFIED: Custom radius parameter is respected
VERIFIED: Rural Kansas area (sparse data) handled gracefully
VERIFIED: Corridor search simulation works - multiple points return unique stations
VERIFIED: fuelPriceService.ts exports: fetchFuelPrices (line 29), fetchCorridorFuelPrices (line 53), findCheapestDiesel (line 114), matchFuelStationToPoi (line 121)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx imports fuel service (line 70), has fuelStations state (line 491)
VERIFIED: Corridor fuel fetch triggered at line 2796 with setFuelStations at line 2799
VERIFIED: POI cards show diesel price in green text (line 4721-4723)

edge_cases.test_station_additional_fields: PASS - lastUpdated, address, phone, open24x7 present

integration.test_fuel_station_matching_to_poi: PASS - stations have coordinates for POI matching

seed_data_creation: None - used HERE Fuel Prices API live data
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001. Vite+Express single-stack. Diesel fuel price integration verified: 1) POST /api/fuel-prices calls HERE fuel.hereapi.com/v3/stations with 'in=circle:lat,lon;r=radius', 2) Backend filters fuelType=5 (diesel) and returns dieselPrice field, 3) Chicago area (41.8781, -87.6298) has 13 stations with diesel prices out of 1771 total, 4) Frontend fuelPriceService.ts exports 4 functions, 5) NavigationView.tsx has data-testid='poi-diesel-price' and 'cheapest-fuel-banner'. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_fuel_prices.py
